title: Vibrant Filipino Pork Biryani
description: A jammy and glassy-jelly Filipino dish featuring green cardamom pods, this vibrant biryani is a show-off dish that is sure to impress, with a dash-friendly flavor profile that will leave you wanting more. It combines the richness of pork with the brightness of Filipino spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat and cook the onion until it is lightly browned.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the pork and cook until it is browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the crushed green cardamom pods, biryani spice mix, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, until the pork is tender, about 20 minutes.
Stir in the jasmine rice and cook, covered, until the rice is tender and the liquid has been absorbed, about 20 minutes.
Deglaze the saucepan with a little water to remove any browned bits from the bottom.
Fluff the biryani with a fork and serve hot.
